default_source.description: How cards should be loaded by default when an invocation does not override the source.

default_card_inline.description: Default Adaptive Card JSON used when default_source is inline.

default_card_asset.description: Default card asset path or reference used when default_source is asset.

catalog_registry_ref.description: Catalog registry reference used when resolving catalog_name entries. Examples: store://greentic-biz/_/adaptive-cards/default or repo://my-repo/cards/catalog.json.

multilingual.description: Whether localized rendering should use supported locales beyond English.

language_mode.description: Whether to allow every built-in locale or a custom subset.

supported_locales.description: Custom locale allow-list used when language_mode is custom. English remains implicit fallback behavior.

direction_mode.description: How the Adaptive Card root rtl flag should be emitted.

trace_enabled.description: Whether to emit adaptive-card trace telemetry by default.

trace_capture_inputs.description: Whether traces may include payload, session, state, and interaction inputs.
